title: Governed Artifact Envelope
description: Canonical top-level envelope required for governed artifacts that participate in deterministic replay, provenance, and control-loop trust boundaries.

id.description: Artifact instance identifier; deterministic when the producer has deterministic identity rules.

timestamp.description: Artifact production timestamp in UTC ISO-8601 format.

schema_version.description: Published contract version for this artifact payload.

primary.description: Primary trace identifier for the emitting run or decision context.

related.description: Related trace identifiers linked to the primary trace.
